pending_slices.task: implement switchboard context output GC and tool-result dedupe

pending_slices.intent: Classify local tool-calling requests before tool injection, hot-load only the relevant built-in tool bundle, allow zero-tool conversational turns, and expose working-set telemetry for local and remote profile policy.
